/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared  -o rosidl_generator_py/dobot_msgs_v4/dobot_msgs_v4_s__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/dobot_msgs_v4_s__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_generator_py/dobot_msgs_v4/_dobot_msgs_v4_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/iudc/dobot_ws/build/dobot_msgs_v4:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib libdobot_msgs_v4__rosidl_generator_py.so libdobot_msgs_v4__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libdobot_msgs_v4__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so libdobot_msgs_v4__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.2.5 /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
